patient_profile_summary.present_illness_positive: left hand clumsiness; left leg clumsiness; onset 10pm; difficulty typing; increased errors typing; left foot dragging sensation; slurred speech; unclear speech; dizziness; left arm clumsiness worsening; left leg clumsiness worsening; started Piroxicam day prior; discontinued aspirin day prior
patient_profile_summary.present_illness_negative: headache; lightheadedness; confusion; difficulty with producing speech; difficulty with comprehending speech; loss of vision; blurred vision; diplopia; vertigo; tinnitus; hearing difficulty; dysphagia; muscle weakness; loss of sensation; bowel incontinence; bladder incontinence; bowel retention; bladder retention; difficulty with gait; fevers; rigors; night sweats; noticeable weight loss; chest pain; palpitations; dyspnea; cough; nausea; vomiting; diarrhea; constipation; abdominal pain; dysuria; hematuria; myalgias; arthralgias; rash
patient_profile_summary.medical_history: Asthma; s/p dermoid cystectomy oopherectomy; s/p removal of sebaceous cyst x2; Arachnoid cyst (thoracic spine) s/p thoracic laminectomy; right hip pain
patient_profile_summary.medication: Loratadine, Multivitamin, Sudafed, Vitamin B Complex, Vitamin D

turns.doctor: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
turns.patient: My left hand and leg feel clumsy. It started last night around 10.

turns.doctor: Can you tell me about your past medical history?
turns.patient: I have asthma. I had a dermoid cyst removed and a sebaceous cyst removed two times. I also had surgery for an arachnoid cyst in my spine. I have right hip pain.

turns.doctor: Do you live alone or with someone?
turns.patient: I live alone. This clumsiness is still here.

turns.doctor: Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
turns.patient: I don't smoke. I drink alcohol sometimes. My left arm feels worse now, too.

turns.doctor: What medications do you usually take?
turns.patient: I take Loratadine, Multivitamin, Sudafed, Vitamin B Complex, and Vitamin D. My left leg feels more clumsy now. I am worried.
They started last night at 10. My speech is also a little slurred, and I feel dizzy. I'm concerned about this.
